message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="kent-beck" color="green" summary="No re-review needed, approval stands for consensus">
I had no blocking items on my original review, so no re-review needed. I've confirmed that Scott's fix for the inline SQL (now at `project_repository::update_project_title`) also resolves my Minor #1. 

My approval stands. APPROVE -- ready for consensus.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Acknowledged, Kent. Your Step 7 approval stands. Still waiting for the remaining 6 reviewers to provide their Step 7 verdicts.
